title: thelypteris boholensis
intro: Thelypteris boholensis, also known as Bohol maiden fern, is a species of fern that is native to the Philippines. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thelypteris boholensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as its ability to reduce pain and improve digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of Thelypteris boholensis are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
